meta.title: Fernanda Haese | Designer & Front-End Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Fernanda Haese — Digital Designer and Front-End Developer creating clean, accessible interfaces.

hero.name: Fernanda
hero.description: I combine design and development to turn ideas into clear, accessible digital experiences that are easy to use.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Digital Designer with experience in UI/UX Design and Front-end Development. I enjoy turning ideas into tangible projects, getting hands-on and being involved throughout the creative process, from research and ideation to defining the visual direction and implementation.

services.title: What I Do
services.description: I bring design and technology together to create clear, consistent and people-centered brands, interfaces and digital experiences.

uxui.title: UX/UI Design
uxui.description: Research, wireframes, prototypes and polished interfaces backed by a scalable design system.

webDesign.title: Web Design
webDesign.description: Editorial, brand-forward web pages that stay responsive, fast and accessible across devices.

frontend.title: Front-end Development
frontend.description: I build responsive and interactive interfaces with React, JavaScript and TypeScript, combining technical quality with close attention to detail.

digitalPresence.title: Digital Presence
digitalPresence.description: I help brands build a consistent and authentic online presence, from their visual identity and social media to their websites and communication materials.

contact.title: Get in Touch!
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Send a message and I'll get back to you shortly.
